calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of And Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Magic Sky USA, Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kristine L. Craig, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Emporium Mall LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Michael Chapman, Property Administrator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Magic Sky USA, Inc., a California corporation.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Lease was filed on February 20, 2019 and personally served on defendant Magic Sky USA, Inc.'s registered Agent of Process on February 21, 2019.
Default as to defendant Magic Sky USA, Inc., a California corporation was entered on March 28, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 12, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Emporium Mall LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Magic Sky USA, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $115,766.73.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $549.00.

Total - $119,140.73.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2019 Continued To Apr-07-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-31-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
